name: Madras-Style Beef Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 15 minutes
2. Cooking time: 1 1/4 hours
3. Mix the vindaloo paste and beef together.
4. Finely chop the onion and cook in the ghee until quite dark in color. Add the beef and cook until brown.
5. Add water to cover, partially cover the pan, and cook for 40 minutes. Then uncover and cook until meat is tender and the sauce is well reduced.
6. Serve garnished with the almonds.
